name: Sellf: Purchase → Google Sheets Sales Log

parameters.content:
## Log every Sellf sale to a Google Sheets ledger

### How it works
[Sellf](https://github.com/jurczykpawel/sellf) - a self-hosted checkout platform for digital products - sends a signed `purchase.completed` webhook for every paid order. This workflow verifies the `X-Sellf-Signature` HMAC header (Stripe-style, replay-protected), acknowledges immediately, and appends one tidy row per sale to your Google Sheet: date, customer, product, amount, bump, coupon, Stripe ids. Rows are matched on the Stripe session id, so a retried delivery updates instead of duplicating.

### Setup
1. In Sellf admin open **Settings → Webhooks**, add an endpoint with this workflow's Production URL (the **Sellf Webhook** node) and copy the signing secret.
2. Fill in **Configuration (EDIT ME)**: the webhook secret, your Google Sheet URL and tab name.
3. Create a header row in the tab: `date | time | email | name | product | product_id | amount | currency | bump | coupon | guest | stripe_session | payment_intent`.
4. Connect your Google account on **Append Sale Row**.
5. See the red note on **Verify Signature** for one required n8n environment setting, then activate.

### Customization tips
Add columns in **Format Row Data** (the full webhook payload also carries invoice data and custom fields). Swap Google Sheets for Airtable, Baserow or a database node - everything up to that node stays the same.

## Receive & Verify
Accepts the Sellf webhook and checks its HMAC signature before trusting the payload.

## Acknowledge & Filter
Responds immediately, keeps only `purchase.completed` and shapes the sheet row.

## Log the Sale
One row per sale, matched on the Stripe session id - retried deliveries never duplicate.

## Node setting required
This Code node needs `require('crypto')`. Self-hosted n8n: set `NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto` in the n8n environment, then restart.

nodes.name: Sellf Webhook
nodes.notes: Paste this node's Production URL into Sellf admin -> Settings -> Webhooks -> Add endpoint.

nodes.name: Configuration (EDIT ME)
nodes.notes: webhookSecret comes from Sellf admin -> Settings -> Webhooks.

nodes.name: Respond OK
nodes.notes: Acknowledge before processing - Sellf retries deliveries that don't get a 2xx.

nodes.name: Is Purchase?
nodes.notes: Only purchase.completed flows through - other events (and Sellf's test deliveries) are dropped.

nodes.name: Append Sale Row
nodes.notes: Upserts by stripe_session so a retried webhook delivery updates the row instead of duplicating it.
